risk.reasoning: The presence of 'Cancellation_Reason' constitutes direct data leakage, ensuring near-perfect but invalid training performance. Additionally, the high feature-to-minority-sample ratio (185 features for ~1,200 churn events) combined with a simple 80/20 split and 35% missingness in key behavioral metrics creates a high probability of the model memorizing noise rather than learning generalizable patterns.

recommended_actions: Remove 'Cancellation_Reason' and any other post-churn indicators to eliminate data leakage
Impute missing values in 'Time_Since_Last_Login' and 'Average_Session_Duration' using median or a constant flag
Drop highly redundant features with a Pearson correlation coefficient greater than 0.85
Apply SMOTE or adjust XGBoost's scale_pos_weight to address the 12% class imbalance
Perform Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE) to select the most predictive behavioral indicators
